title: Hiring Software Engineer at Cropin Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Hiring Software Engineer at Cropin Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Join the Cropin Asia Pacific Associates family as a Software Engineer in Dhanbad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Cropin Asia Pacific Associates:
Cropin Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cropin Asia Pacific Associates!
